phrases.intent_en: Ask how many châteaux are represented in the park
phrases.text_local: Combien de châteaux sont représentés dans le parc ?
phrases.pronunciation: kom-BYAN duh shah-TOH son ruh-pray-zahn-TAY dahn luh PARK
phrases.cultural_note: The Parc des Mini-Châteaux presents over 40 scale models of Loire Valley châteaux at 1:25 scale, set in a landscaped garden with miniature rivers.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which model represents the smallest château
phrases.text_local: Quel est le modèle du plus petit château ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ay luh moh-DEL doo ploos puh-TEE shah-TOH
phrases.cultural_note: The models are built to scale and include famous châteaux such as Chambord, Chenonceau, Azay-le-Rideau, and Villandry.

responses.english: It's shown on the park map.
responses.phonetic: seh ehn-dee-KAY soor luh PLAHN doo PARK
responses.french: C'est indiqué sur le plan du parc.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a children's activity area
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un espace d'activités pour les enfants ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un es-PASS dak-tee-vee-TAY poor lay zahn-FAHN
phrases.cultural_note: Mini-Châteaux is particularly popular with families; there are additional children's activities and a section for model trains.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the model of Château de Chambord is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la maquette du Château de Chambord ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah mah-KET doo shah-TOH duh shahm-BOR
phrases.cultural_note: The model of Chambord, with its famous double-helix staircase designed in the style of Leonardo da Vinci, is one of the most impressive in the park.

responses.english: In the centre of the park, on the right.
responses.phonetic: oh SAHN-truh doo PARK, soor lah DRWAHT
responses.french: Au centre du parc, sur la droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the combined ticket with Clos Lucé
phrases.text_local: Existe-t-il un billet combiné avec le Clos Lucé ?
phrases.pronunciation: eg-ZEEST-teel un bee-YAY kom-bee-NAY ah-VEK luh kloh loo-SAY
phrases.cultural_note: Combination tickets covering Mini-Châteaux and Clos Lucé are available; inquire at the entrance for current offers.

responses.english: Yes, ask at the ticket office.
